== Notes for [[Item:Q105452|Q105452]] ==

* [https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Matthew+1&version=KJV Matthew 1:14]

Wikipedia: [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Matthew_1:14 1:14].

Mat 1:14

Mat 1:14

Ancestor of Jesus Christ

Ancestor of Jesus Christ

OR "AKIM"

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000008785311429

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]]
[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]][[Category:Pages]]
